name: Web Research
description: Secure web research: search the public web, fetch pages through an egress chokepoint, sanitize, and frame as untrusted content. Implements the M65 seven-layer trifecta defense.

webResearch.dailyBudget.description: Maximum Brave Search API calls allowed per local-time day.

webResearch.ambientEnabled.description: Allow the agent to autonomously invoke web tools without an explicit user ask. Off by default to bound free-tier query spend.

webResearch.hubPageId.description: Canvas page id of the Research Hub. Lazy-created on first use; the research-topic skill reads this via getResearchHub and writes it via setResearchHub. Renameable through the canvas UI.

webResearch.hubPageTitle.description: Display title of the Research Hub page. Default "Research Hub"; renameable through the canvas UI.
